name: pi-muselinn-harness
description: Kimi Code-style agent orchestration harness for Pi coding agent — Swarm (concurrent subagents + braille TUI), Goal (lifecycle + budget + queue), Plan (plan mode + tool restrictions), Permission (18-level policy chain: auto/yolo/manual), Task (background + cron), Hooks (config.toml [[hooks]] engine: 16 events, blockable PreToolUse/Stop/UserPromptSubmit), Skills (pi-native seven-scope scanner: .pi/skills + ~/.pi/agent/skills first, Kimi Code dirs as compat layer)
author: MuseLinn
